tuition: SGD 73,030 (Full-Time, Non-CMU track); SGD 78,480 (CMU dual-campus track, excludes ~SGD 18,000 CMU travel/living costs)
campus: 50 Nanyang Avenue, Singapore 639798 (Jurong West); CMU track includes a period at Carnegie Mellon University, USA

requirements.undergrad_background: A good undergraduate degree in applied mathematics, applied science, statistics, computer science, engineering, economics, or other quantitative fields; non-quantitative backgrounds may also be considered
requirements.gmat_gre: A good GMAT or GRE score taken within the last 5 years is generally expected (institution code GMAT V24-ZV-17, GRE 3123); optional/exempt for NTU SPMS graduates with Honours (Distinction) and above.
requirements.prerequisites: Strong quantitative background (math, statistics, programming) preferred given curriculum focus

deadlines.notes: 官网当前展示的是 July 2027 入学季(2026年9月开放申请),学费页面标注为 August 2027 intake,周期一致。查询时间为 2026-07-20。

notes: 全日制12-24个月、非全日制24-48个月(官网原文表述为区间,已按全日制标准12个月填写duration_months)。提供与Carnegie Mellon University联合的CMU track选项,费用更高且需额外承担在美生活/差旅费约SGD 18,000。中国院校无分档说明。

requirements.prerequisites: All students required to complete online preparatory courses in Statistics and Mathematics before/during the trimester

notes: 官网明确说明'不需要推荐信'(the referee report is not required),故materials中不含two_references,与其它NBS项目不同。GMAT/GRE官网未提及要求。申请费未在页面明确列出(NBS项目通常为S$100,但本项目未确认,故未填入tuition外的费用字段)。学费S$47,300为国际学生费率示例,新加坡公民/PR另有S$5,000补贴、NTU校友享10%学费减免。另需不可退确认押金S$15,000(计入首期学费)。非NBS,由社会科学学院(SSS)开设,但对内地商科/经济方向申请者也是热门选择,故纳入本次采集。

program_name_en: MSc in Supply Chain Engineering (formerly MSc Supply Chain & Logistics)
faculty: School of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering (MAE)
tuition: SGD 53,562.60 (full programme, AY2026-2027, subject to annual revision)

requirements.undergrad_background: (A) A good bachelor's degree in Mechanical or Industrial Engineering or a related discipline with mathematical/production training, or (B) a bachelor's degree in engineering or a related discipline with mathematical training plus at least 2 years relevant industry experience. Business graduates considered if relevant specialization/experience supported by an employer letter.
requirements.gpa_requirement: No minimum stated for general admission (scholarship holders must maintain CGPA ≥3.50 each semester to keep scholarship eligibility)
requirements.prerequisites: Mathematical/production training background per pathway (A) or (B) above
requirements.work_experience: Not mandatory in general, but required (≥2 years) under admission pathway (B) for non-Mechanical/Industrial Engineering related degrees; business graduates also need relevant experience with employer letter
requirements.interview: Not required for general admission; scholarship applicants may be invited for interview

deadlines.notes: 该项目为1月入学(January 2027 intake),申请期为2026年7月1日至2026年8月31日,奖学金申请截止同为2026年8月31日。与NBS商科硕士的7月入学季不同,请注意区分。查询时间为 2026-07-20。

notes: 由机械与航天工程学院(MAE)开设,并非Nanyang Business School项目,但因供应链/物流方向是中国学生商科申请热门方向而纳入采集,请留意其学院与NBS不同、入学月份(1月而非7月)也不同。官网未明确GMAT/GRE要求(视为不需要)。全日制最短1年最长2年,选择'8门课+论文'选项通常需1.5年;本条duration_months按最短全日制1年填写。中国院校无分档说明。学费为AY2026-2027数据,新周期(AY2027-2028)费用页面未查到更新数字。

faculty: Nanyang Business School / Wealth Management Institute (WMI)

deadlines.notes: 官网抓取到的时间线为 'AY2026 intake'(申请于2025年8月开放,面试/筛选2026年1-3月,申请截止2026年4月15日,2026年6月入学),该截止日期(2026-04-15)在本次查询日期(2026-07-20)之前已经过去,说明官网该页面尚未更新为下一入学季信息,故当前开放周期不明确,opens_at/final_deadline如实留空,不编造下一周期日期。在线申请表单链接文件名含'AY2627'字样,暗示可能已进入AY26/27周期但页面文字未同步更新。

notes: 该项目要求至少2年工作经验,面向在职人士(work-study,隔周末上课),与其它NBS全日制硕士定位不同。校园地点未在抓取内容中明确说明(WMI教学地点与NTU主校区可能不同,未能确认,故campus留空)。当前申请周期信息因页面未及时更新而不确定,建议直接联系 mawm@wmi.edu.sg 或访问官网确认最新截止日期,已诚实标注confidence为low。中国院校无分档说明。
